title: YAES
description: Create and Origins. Lots of structures enhancing, overworld, nether and end experience. More bosses, mobs and general animals. Improved villages and farmer's delight giving lots of variety in the world.
body:
### Yaes Modpack
This modpack aims to improve exploration with **lots of tiny structures scattered around** and by improving existing ones. All **yungs mods** are of course included and furthermore villagers plus makes the already beautifull villages even more alive. **Higher and mightier terrain** with Terralith and **more biomes** with Oh The Biomes You'll Go. Compensating for the relatively barren other dimension there are lots **more biomes in the end** and **more mobs** in both the end and nether. In order to enhance the experience playing an underwater origin there are **more structures underwater** and better trident mechanics. In order to run well this modpack contains lots of optimisation mods and has been curated to minimise mod compatibility issuess. 

This modpack has been configured to be able to run on a server, with lots of multiplayer enhancing mods.

## This modpack uses these fantastic assets:
[stay true](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true) resourcepack: [link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)

[Effective](https://modrinth.com/mod/effective/version/2.0+1.19.2) mod: [link](https://modrinth.com/mod/effective/version/2.0+1.19.2)
